b2c-splash.name: Splash
b2c-splash.notes: Shown on first launch. Persist “hasSeenSplash” in local storage in real app.

b2c-lang.name: Language
b2c-lang.notes: English + العربية. Drives copy direction and strings.

b2c-onboarding.name: Onboarding (value props)
b2c-onboarding.purpose: Explain map-first discovery and booking in 2–3 beats.
b2c-onboarding.notes: Show once per install or until completed.

b2c-auth.name: Auth — choose path
b2c-auth.purpose: Route to log in vs register.
b2c-auth.notes: No phone OTP. Email + password only on next screens.

b2c-login.name: Log in (email)
b2c-login.purpose: Authenticate existing user with email + password.

b2c-addcar.name: Add first car
b2c-addcar.purpose: Onboard user with their vehicle so the map & tracker are useful.
b2c-addcar.notes: Skippable — user can browse map without a car, but can't book.

b2c-map.name: Map — Home (CORE)
b2c-map.purpose: Discover nearby verified service centers in <60s.
b2c-map.notes: PostGIS query <within radius>. Bottom sheet shows top 3 pins. One-tap call on pin.

b2c-marketplace.name: Parts marketplace
b2c-marketplace.purpose: Browse filters, oil, batteries, and accessories; compare sellers; cart placeholder.
b2c-marketplace.notes: B2C parts layer — feed from catalog or partner API; checkout Phase 1 optional.

b2c-filters.name: Filters sheet
b2c-filters.purpose: Narrow results by service, price, rating, open-now, distance, verified.
b2c-filters.notes: Filter chips on map header persist selection.

b2c-search.name: Search results (list)
b2c-search.purpose: Alt view to map — sortable list.

b2c-shop.name: Service center profile
b2c-shop.notes: Verified badge is load-bearing for trust.

b2c-tow.name: Tow truck profile
b2c-tow.purpose: View tow operator, ETA, coverage, fleet; request dispatch or call.
b2c-tow.notes: Roadside / tow supply (PRD Phase 4). Same booking shell can collect pickup + drop-off in production.

b2c-service.name: Pick service
b2c-service.notes: Quote-only routes to chat flow (phase 2) — for MVP use tap-to-call.

b2c-slot.name: Pick slot
b2c-slot.purpose: Reserve a time from center's capacity.
b2c-slot.notes: Edge function holds slot for 10 min via `booking_holds` row.

b2c-payment.name: Review & pay
b2c-payment.purpose: Confirm booking and pay (or defer to cash).
b2c-payment.notes: MVP open question: cash-only vs in-app pay. Support both, default card.

b2c-bookings.name: My bookings
b2c-bookings.notes: Realtime status via Supabase Realtime channel on booking_id.

b2c-progress.name: Booking in progress
b2c-progress.purpose: Live status while the shop works.
b2c-progress.notes: Timeline component mirrors B2B status updates.

b2c-review.name: Rate & review
b2c-review.notes: Category ratings: quality, price, speed, honesty.

b2c-cardetail.name: Car detail + history
b2c-cardetail.notes: Auto-logged entries come from completed bookings — no duplicate UI.

b2c-reminder.name: Reminder → Book
b2c-reminder.purpose: Retention flow: push → 3 recommendations → book in 2 taps.
b2c-reminder.notes: Smart reminders tied to booking history.

b2c-expenses.name: Expenses (Phase 2)
b2c-expenses.notes: Phase 2. Placeholder here for spec completeness.

b2b-splash.name: Splash (Business)
b2b-splash.notes: Mirrors B2C cold start; separate binary or flavor in production.

b2b-onboarding.name: Onboarding (Business)
b2b-onboarding.purpose: Explain bookings, catalog, verification for shops.

b2b-auth.name: Auth — choose path
b2b-auth.purpose: Log in vs create business account.
b2b-auth.notes: Email + password only on following screens.

b2b-login.name: Log in (Business)
b2b-login.purpose: Existing shop owner signs in with work email.

b2b-signup.name: Register (Business)
b2b-signup.purpose: Create account with work email + password before business profile.
b2b-signup.notes: No phone field. Business/legal details on following onboarding steps.

b2b-onboard-3.name: Onboarding — Catalog
b2b-onboard-3.notes: Prepopulate common services (oil, tires, brakes, AC).

b2b-dashboard.name: Dashboard (today)
b2b-dashboard.notes: Toast + sound on new booking via Realtime.

b2b-booking.name: Booking detail
b2b-booking.notes: Status changes push to B2C in realtime.

b2b-reviews.name: Reviews
b2b-reviews.notes: Response is public, one per review.

b2b-more.name: More (B2B hub)
b2b-more.purpose: Reach reviews, payouts, and settings from bottom tab overflow.
b2b-more.notes: Fourth tab; keeps primary nav uncluttered on phone.

b2b-payouts.name: Payouts (Phase 2)
b2b-payouts.notes: Commission % tied to tier (Free 15% / Pro 10% / Authorized 8%).

ftg-overview.name: Orientation & reading order
ftg-overview.purpose: Onboard engineers to product surfaces, sources of truth (PRD, prototype, ADRs), and read-first topics.
ftg-overview.notes: Sources of truth: PRD, this prototype, ADRs. Surfaces: B2C mobile (map-first), B2B adaptive (tablet + phone), minimal admin + Supabase Studio. Ownership: ~2 B2C, ~2 B2B, 1 tech lead for shared packages + BaaS. Read first: email/password auth MVP, PostGIS map pins + filters, booking state + Realtime sync with B2B.

ftg-repo-flavors.name: Repo layout, flavors, envs
ftg-repo-flavors.purpose: Document mono-repo shape, flavors, --dart-define / env matrix, and secrets handling (no keys in git).
ftg-repo-flavors.notes: Example: apps/carcare_b2c, apps/carcare_b2b, packages/core, packages/ui, packages/features/*. Flavor matrix: bundle IDs, display names, API URL injection. CI variable naming convention.

ftg-architecture.name: Layers & dependency rules
ftg-architecture.purpose: Single agreed architecture so the team does not fork patterns across features.
ftg-architecture.notes: Feature-first + Clean: Presentation (go_router, MVVM-style Notifier/Bloc) → optional Application use-cases → Domain (entities, repo interfaces, no Flutter/Supabase imports) → Data (Supabase impl, DTOs). Extract packages/features/* when stable. Errors: Result/Failure; user-facing vs log-only. Suggested packages: go_router, Riverpod or Bloc, supabase_flutter, freezed, maps + geolocator — see phone mock stack + pkg row.

ftg-routing-deeplinks.name: Navigation & deep links
ftg-routing-deeplinks.purpose: Global routing, tab shells, auth redirects, and deep links (booking, shop, push targets).
ftg-routing-deeplinks.notes: Route tree + guest vs authenticated redirects. URL scheme / app links placeholders. Android back stack; state restoration expectations.

ftg-state-di.name: State management & DI
ftg-state-di.purpose: One primary pattern for async UI and testability (Riverpod or Bloc — pick one team-wide).
ftg-state-di.notes: Notifiers/Blocs per feature; repositories injected. When AsyncValue vs local ValueNotifier. Widget tests: provider overrides / bloc mocks.

ftg-supabase.name: Supabase integration
ftg-supabase.purpose: Auth, Postgres + RLS, Realtime, Storage, Edge Functions (e.g. slot holds) from Flutter.
ftg-supabase.notes: Client lifecycle, session refresh, sign-out cleanup. RLS assumptions per feature (pins, bookings, reviews). Realtime channel naming; B2B new-booking toast. Storage buckets for photos / verification docs.

ftg-maps-location.name: Maps, geo, permissions
ftg-maps-location.purpose: Map-first discovery aligned with prototype b2c-map: PostGIS results, pins, list toggle, emergency mode.
ftg-maps-location.notes: SDK choice (Google vs Mapbox) vs licensing. PostGIS response shape contract. Pin clustering, bottom sheet, perf budget.

ftg-media-forms.name: Forms, validation, uploads
ftg-media-forms.purpose: Booking funnel and B2B profile flows: validation, i18n messages, image pick → compress → Storage.
ftg-media-forms.notes: Shared patterns for VIN/catalog fields if reused across surfaces. Accessibility on form fields.

ftg-ui-i18n-rtl.name: Design system, i18n, RTL
ftg-ui-i18n-rtl.purpose: Material 3 + tokens from prototype CSS; English + العربية; RTL-critical layouts.
ftg-ui-i18n-rtl.notes: Map ThemeExtension from design tokens. intl + ARB workflow. Golden tests for map chrome and booking in RTL.

ftg-quality-release.name: Testing, CI/CD, observability
ftg-quality-release.purpose: Definition of done: lint, tests, build gates, crash reporting, store release.
ftg-quality-release.notes: Pyramid: unit (domain), widget, integration (Patrol or integration_test). PR pipeline: format, analyze, test, build. Crashlytics or Sentry + PII rules. Signing and versioning.
